```css title=components/button/index.css

/*!*****************************************!*\
  !*** ./src/components/button/index.css ***!
  \*****************************************/
.button {
  color: blue;
}


```

```css title=index.css

/*!***********************!*\
  !*** ./src/index.css ***!
  \***********************/
.app {
  color: red;
}


```

```mjs title=index.mjs
// ./src/index.js




it('should preserve modules with native css', () => {
  expect((/* inlined export .name */"button")).toBe('button')
})


```

```mjs title=runtime.mjs
// The require scope
var __webpack_require__ = {};


export { __webpack_require__ };

```
